summary: Resolve Greptile P1/P2 review findings: preserve partial renders on mid-render timeout (generate/redo RunE + pollForNewDesigns), and correct redo's Short description (checkpoint, not style).
reason: Greptile re-review of the full CLI flagged that a mid-render timeout discarded already-finished (and downloaded) designs, and that redo's Short advertised 'style' which redo does not resubmit (Style is hardcoded empty; only checkpoint is reused).
validated_outcome: go build/vet pass; go test ./... passes. pollForNewDesigns now returns the last-known done set on fetch error; generate/redo emit partial results before the non-zero exit.
